message: I've been thinking about power outages lately — not in a doom way, just in a "wouldn't it be nice to have a plan" way. I found a solid resource from Ready.gov that walks through the practical stuff: what to do before, during, and after the lights go out. Turns out a little prep makes these situations way less stressful. What's your go-to move when the power cuts out — do you have any tricks that actually work?
